subject: GRB 100614 :  XMM-Newton observation
body:
XMM-Newton is observing GRB 100614 (RA=17h 34m 05s, DEC=+49d 13' 16", J2000),
starting at 04:12 UT, on June 15, 2010, for an exposure of 42 ksec.
